textByHash.8f7c8680c48da0576cc7e9f2c4603997fe97898c: Hello. Let's get to business. I got scissors. You got hair. Want to do this?
textByHash.50cf832aff339216d28be5963b727b383afdc123: Awesome! There are so many hair styles to pick from. What would you like?
textByHash.e59de26528435fcc386ebaa646efa10ea0b75b2d: Sweet! There are so many facial hair styles to pick from. What would you like?
textByHash.a06b7161b44907f90922de959aaaccb1990943e3: 9 times out of 10. Though I wouldn't call it aggressive... I just like cutting straight to the point.
textByHash.f40b211d03547ef5750626d86aa320762e865ea7: Speaking of straight to the point. What can I help you with?
textByHash.d97e0b16d53a272d53ac7cdd1a1b8191e1288404: My name is Emma. I LOVE hair! There are so many cool things you can do with it.
textByHash.b9460231f7616c137e0c07af17a4d0c9ac179e49: No, I used to be a sheep shearer. However, the farmer wasn't too happy when I dyed his favourite sheep pink and gave it a side-cut.
textByHash.d51122e12f5e50967056d9af51adbebd655c7d59: Anyway, enough chit-chat. What can I help you with?
textByHash.252dc3c48fa6b5e23b479a20cbf67823ac5b15d5: That's Suzie, my sister. She's a bit shy around strangers, but a lovely person! I just wish more people would see that.
textByHash.5735f5c7779378e8dc63fdc0fcf0243daa60790f: Only to me. She wants to, it's just... difficult.
textByHash.6cfb0c740d4be575d04ca61bfa98f44caf2acdb6: She likes being around the shop. My hope is that when more customers come in, she'll gradually get used to strangers and open up a bit more.
textByHash.2c2bc6e8c586a2dfd3c07dd97608a9133ec286e8: Thank you. Now... What can I do for you?
textByHash.132d44b4091ec13153a602839681ae8a88da039d: Suit yourself. Come back if you'd like a trim!
textByHash.7ff1a22e89cb836e407a86a5487f83529d7997e7: Suit yourself. Come back if you change your mind!
